data_terms.fair_use_note: Do not use the API or website in a way that degrades availability, bypasses limits, probes security, overwhelms infrastructure, or misrepresents request origin.

public_endpoints.summary: Canonical metadata index for chains, metrics, units, DA layers, and coverage.
Flat daily export across public fundamental metrics for the last 90 days.
Flat full-history export for one public fundamental metric.
Cross-chain hourly fee table payload with transaction-cost metrics, TPS, throughput, and normalized comparison values.
Rich chain summary with highlights, events, rankings, KPI cards, achievements, and ecosystem context.
Rich per-chain metric payload with daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly, and optional hourly series.
Project coverage typed table with owner_project and descriptive metadata.
Filtered project coverage typed table for owner_project values with actual datapoints such as txcount.
Rich project detail JSON for owner_project values with mapped contract activity.
